name: Eugene Menski
tagline: I read organizations the way a physicist reads a system — finding the hidden constraint behind the symptoms.
contact_blurb: I take on a small number of senior engagements — engineering leadership, technical advisory, and exploratory founder conversations.

hero.headline_rest: Systems often do — I find the structure that explains the symptoms, including in the shift to AI.
hero.bio: I'm a systems thinker and a human translator. For 15 years — across orgs from 30 to 50,000+ people — I've found the hidden constraints that make capable teams miss, made delivery observable, and turned that into predictability. Now I'm applying the same lens to the next transformation: AI as an operating model, not just a tool.

terminal.whoami: systems thinker · delivery leader · now applying both to AI
